title: ECOVACS DEEBOT X8 PRO OMNI Robot Vacuum and Mop, 18000Pa, OZMO ROLLER Instant Self-Washing Mopping, 40-75℃ Hot Water Mop Washing, Auto Cleaning Solution Adding, Hot Air-Drying, Self-Emptying, Black
features: 【OZMO ROLLER Instant Self-Washing Mopping】OZMO ROLLER Mopping cleans what previous generations ( flat mop/vibrating flat mop/dual-plate mops ) can’t, it won't miss edges and corners，leave streaks or make dirty mops spread the mess around. 16 water nozzles disperse clean water, evenly dampening the roller with fresh water. Washes the roller 200 times per minute, keeping it clean for every scrub. The unique scraper squeezes out dirty water,no cross-contamination. Quickly sucks the dirty water back up into the dirty water tank, then the cleaning cycle begins again to ensure constant cleaning.

【Extended OZMO ROLLER Mop & Side Brush】When cleaning along edges, the side brush extends to reach gaps and corners, ensuring a truly deep clean and leaving no dirt or debris behind. The roller mop dynamically extends while cleaning along edges and corners, hugging every spot for a thorough clean.The extended OZMO ROLLER Mop & Side Brush leaves no corner untouched，achieve edge-to-edge mopping，100% edge and corner coverage.

【18,000Pa Suction Power & ZeroTangle 2.0 & 10mm Auto-lift Mopping】DEEBOT X8 PRO OMNI delivers 18,000Pa of powerful suction devours dirt and debris like a hurricane. When encountering carpets, DEEBOT automatically lifts the roller mop to 10mm, avoiding wetting your carpet and boosts suction powver for a deeper clean. ZeroTangle 2.0 technology, featuring triple V-shaped structures, actively gathers, lifts, and untangles hair, ensuring a tanglingrate as low as 0%-even withlong hair.

【12-in-1 OMNI Station】The upgraded OMNI station with precise 3 adjustable heat levels (40°C, 55°C, 75°C） for mop washing. Automatically adjust the mop washing temperature according to the room type and dirt level, maximizing cleaning efficiency and ensuring optimal results without unnecessary extra washing. In addition, the station detects the dirtiness of the mop roller, prompting the robot to re-mop dirtier areas until the floor is spotless. It also provides 63°C hot air drying, auto cleaning solution adding.

【Recognize Everything, Clean along Everything】DEEBOT X8 PRO OMNI recognizes everything and cleans along every edge for maximum cleanliness. AIVI 3D 3.0 technology, working with the 3D edge sensor, recognizes obstacles and their contours, allowing DEEBOT to clean along objects without colliding or steering too far away, ensuring no area is left uncleaned. AIVI 3D 3.0 Omni-Approach Technology extensively trained on home environments, directly identifies obstacle positions and shapes by analyzing environmental data for limitless obstacle recognition.

【YIKO-GPT Intelligent Assistant】With the generative AI capabilities of the new YIKO-GPT Intelligent Assistant, the advanced Large Language Model (LLM) allows the robot to understand the intention of the user and provides feedback accurately and intelligently by communicating through any type of interaction including text, voice messages or long conversations.
